flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-Chico rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($8.2k → $10.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Chico fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).
